_meta.note: The fldigi diagonal (de)interleaver, size=2, depth=40 (PSK125R idepth). `in` = 2-bit code pairs fed to the forward interleaver; `fwd` = its output (one bit of each pair delayed by `depth`); `rev` = round-trip through the reverse interleaver (recovers `in` delayed by `depth` pairs; 256 = an un-repacked PUNCTURE fill). omnimodem's DiagInterleaver forward output must reproduce `fwd` byte-for-byte.
